question.text: Which of the following is an advantage of commodity futures over commodity forwards?

answer.text: Elimination of counterparty credit risk through central counter-party clearing

explanation.text: **The Logic:** A key advantage of futures is elimination of counterparty credit risk because exchanges interpose as central counter-party through the clearing corporation. **The Trap:** Customization is a forward feature. Futures DO require margins. Futures are settled daily (not just at maturity). **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII and I cover the same advantages of exchange-traded vs OTC derivatives. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The CCP guarantee is why commodity futures participants need only deposit margin (5-15% of contract value) — the exchange backing makes full upfront payment unnecessary.
